name: Bronchial Asthma
definition: A chronic airway inflammatory disease characterized by reversible airflow limitation
etiology: Genetic factors, environmental factors, allergen exposure, respiratory infections
symptoms: Recurrent wheezing, shortness of breath, chest tightness, cough
treatment_principles: Control airway inflammation, relieve symptoms, avoid triggers, long-term standardized treatment
prevention_advice: Avoid allergens, prevent respiratory infections, strengthen physical fitness, standardized medication
